function_v0.doc: Return funds from proxy custody to the stoken vault\nAllowed even when paused (returning liquidity is always beneficial).
function_v0.name: return_funds

function_v0.doc: Forward funds from proxy custody to a whitelisted target's custody.\nCallable by manager or processor with respective limit enforcement.
function_v0.name: forward_funds

function_v0.doc: Emergency sweep tokens from a paused proxy to the vault's address.\nRequires proxy to be paused and emergency cooldown period elapsed.\nIf amount is 0, sweeps the entire balance.
function_v0.name: emergency_sweep

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a role is granted.
event_v0.name: RoleGranted

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a role is revoked.
event_v0.name: RoleRevoked

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when the admin role is renounced.
event_v0.name: AdminRenounced

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a role admin is changed.
event_v0.name: RoleAdminChanged

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an admin transfer is completed.
event_v0.name: AdminTransferCompleted

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an admin transfer is initiated.
event_v0.name: AdminTransferInitiated

udt_struct_v0.doc: Storage key for enumeration of accounts per role.
udt_struct_v0.name: RoleAccountKey

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for the data associated with the access control
udt_union_v0.name: AccessControlStorageKey

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an ownership transfer is initiated.

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when ownership is renounced.
event_v0.name: OwnershipRenounced

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an ownership transfer is completed.
event_v0.name: OwnershipTransferCompleted

cases.doc: When migration is attempted but not allowed due to upgrade state.
cases.name: MigrationNotAllowed

event_v0.name: SetRoot

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an index is claimed.
event_v0.name: SetClaimed

cases.doc: The merkle root is not set.
cases.name: RootNotSet

cases.doc: The provided index was already claimed.
cases.name: IndexAlreadyClaimed

udt_union_v0.name: MerkleDistributorStorageKey

void_v0.doc: The Merkle root of the distribution tree
void_v0.name: Root

tuple_v0.doc: Maps an index to its claimed status
tuple_v0.name: Claimed

cases.doc: The operation failed because the denominator is 0.
cases.name: ZeroDenominator

cases.doc: The operation failed because a phantom overflow occurred.
cases.name: PhantomOverflow

cases.doc: The operation failed because the result does not fit in Self.

cases.name: MerkleProofOutOfBounds

cases.doc: The index of the leaf is out of bounds.
